system.name: Polar
system.description: Open source payment infrastructure platform for developers — merchant of record handling billing, subscriptions, digital products, and tax compliance.

people.name: Merchant
people.description: Developer or organization selling digital products and subscriptions through Polar.

people.name: Customer
people.description: End user purchasing products, subscriptions, or digital benefits from a merchant.

external_systems.name: Stripe
external_systems.description: Payment processor handling charges, subscriptions, and payouts.

external_systems.name: GitHub
external_systems.description: Used for OAuth authentication and repository-based benefit grants.

external_systems.name: PostgreSQL
external_systems.description: Primary relational database storing all business entities.

external_systems.name: Redis
external_systems.description: Cache and message broker for Dramatiq background job queues.

external_systems.name: S3-compatible Storage
external_systems.description: Object storage for file uploads, invoices, and downloadable content.

relationships.description: Manages products, subscriptions, and views analytics via the web dashboard.
Purchases products and manages subscriptions via checkout and customer portal.
Processes payments, manages subscriptions, and handles payouts.
Authenticates users via OAuth and grants repository access as a benefit.
Stores and retrieves all business data.
Queues background jobs and caches transient data.
Stores uploaded files, invoices, and downloadable content.
